# Getting Started

## Install and Launch R Packages


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)
```
:::


## Import Datasss


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
exam_data <- read_csv("data/Exam_data.csv")
```
:::


## Simple Bar Chart


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(data = exam_data, 
       aes(x = RACE)) +
    geom_bar()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](HO_Ex1_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::
